name: cap-screen-recorder
title: Cap
description: Control Cap Screen Recorder via Raycast
author: denaev-dev

commands.name: start
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.description: Start recording the screen with Cap

commands.name: toggle-pause
commands.title: Toggle Pause
commands.description: Pause or resume the current Cap recording

commands.name: switch-mic
commands.title: Switch Microphone
commands.description: Switch the active microphone for Cap

commands.name: switch-camera
commands.title: Switch Camera
commands.description: Switch the active camera for Cap
